briefdescription.para: face can have neighbor only via edge

detaileddescription.para: face can have neighbor via vertex

briefdescription.para: Face incidence type.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, MR.FaceId id, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null)
memberdef.name: getComponent

briefdescription.para: returns one connected component containing given face, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponents Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponent. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

returns one connected component containing given vertex, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponentsVerts Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponentVerts.
returns the largest by number of elements component Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargestComponentVerts.
returns the union of vertex connected components, each having at least

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null, float? minArea=null, MR.Misc.InOut< int >? numSmallerComponents=null)
memberdef.name: getLargestComponent

briefdescription.para: returns the largest by surface area component or empty set if its area is smaller than

parameterdescription.para: Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargestComponent. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge. Parameter minArea defaults to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, MR.Const_FaceBitSet seeds, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null)
memberdef.name: getComponents

briefdescription.para: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed face Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponents. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshTopology topology, MR.Const_FaceBitSet seeds, MR.Const_FaceBitSet? region=null, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null)
memberdef.name: getComponents

briefdescription.para: Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponents. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.
returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargeByAreaComponents.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, MR.UnionFind_MRFaceId unionFind, float minArea, MR.UndirectedEdgeBitSet? outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=null)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaComponents

briefdescription.para: given prepared union-find structure returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargeByAreaComponents.
expands given seeds to whole components Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.expandToComponents. Parameter params_ defaults to {}.
returns requested number of largest by area connected components in descending by area order Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getNLargeByAreaComponents.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, float minArea, float angleFromPlanar, MR.UndirectedEdgeBitSet? outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=null)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaSmoothComponents

briefdescription.para: returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area, and any two faces in a connected component have a path along the surface across the edges, where surface does not deviate from plane more than on given angle Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargeByAreaSmoothComponents.
returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed vert Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponentsVerts.
returns the number of connected components in mesh part Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getNumComponents. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.
gets all connected components of mesh part

simplesect.para: be careful, if mesh is large enough and has many components, the memory overflow will occur Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponents. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, int maxComponentCount, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null)
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

briefdescription.para: gets all connected components of mesh part \detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size

simplesect.para: pair components bitsets vector and number components in one group if components number more than maxComponentCount Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponents. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Face2RegionMap componentsMap, int componentsCount, MR.Const_FaceBitSet region, int maxComponentCount)
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

briefdescription.para: gets all connected components from components map ( FaceId => RegionId ) \detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size (this similarly changes componentsMap)

simplesect.para: components bitsets vector Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponents.

briefdescription.para: gets all connected components of mesh part as

listitem.para: the mapping: FaceId -> Component ID in [0, 1, 2, ...)
the total number of components Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsMap. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

briefdescription.para: computes the area of each region given via the map Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getRegionAreas.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshPart meshPart, MR.Const_Face2RegionMap regionMap, int numRegions, float minArea)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaRegions

briefdescription.para: returns

listitem.para: the union of all regions with area >= minArea
the number of such regions Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getLargeByAreaRegions.

briefdescription.para: gets all connected components of mesh part Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsVerts.
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary) Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsVertsSeparatedByPath.
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given paths (either closed or from boundary to boundary) Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsVertsSeparatedByPaths.
subdivides given edges on connected components Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsEdges.
subdivides given edges on connected components Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getAllComponentsUndirectedEdges.
returns true if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.hasFullySelectedComponent.
Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.hasFullySelectedComponent.
if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection, excludes these vertices Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.excludeFullySelectedComponents.

gets union-find structure for faces with different options of face-connectivity Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureFaces. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_MeshTopology topology, MR.Const_FaceBitSet? region=null, MR.MeshComponents.FaceIncidence? incidence=null, MR.Const_UndirectedEdgeBitSet? isCompBd=null)
memberdef.name: getUnionFindStructureFaces

briefdescription.para: Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureFaces. Parameter incidence defaults to FaceIncidence.PerEdge.

gets union-find structure for faces with connectivity by shared edge, and optional edge predicate whether to skip uniting components over it it is guaranteed that isCompBd is invoked in a thread-safe manner (that left and right face are always processed by one thread) Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureFacesPerEdge.
Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureFacesPerEdge.
gets union-find structure for vertices Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVerts.
Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVerts.
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given edges only Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVerts.
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given undirected edges only Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVerts.
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by all edges excluding given ones Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVertsEx.
gets union-find structure for vertices, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary)

parameterdescription.para: this set receives all vertices passed by the path Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVertsSeparatedByPath.

briefdescription.para: Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureVertsSeparatedByPaths.
gets union-find structure for all undirected edges in

parameterdescription.para: if true, then every element in the structure will point directly to the root of its respective component Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getUnionFindStructureUndirectedEdges. Parameter allPointToRoots defaults to false.

briefdescription.para: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed edge Generated from function MR.MeshComponents.getComponentsUndirectedEdges.
